name: changelog
description: Changelog component — versioned entries with a timeline and typed change badges (added/fixed/changed/removed/security)
whenToUse: Use for versioned release notes with typed change entries: added, fixed, changed, removed, security.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for general timelines — use a Steps or list. Do not use for non-versioned content.
example:
<Changelog version="2.1.0" date="2026-01-15">
  <ChangelogEntry type="added">Collapse animation on Accordion</ChangelogEntry>
  <ChangelogEntry type="fixed">Focus ring on mobile Safari</ChangelogEntry>
</Changelog>
